LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.MergeInstruction: Merge today's memories into existing impressions, output JSON (keep {0} entries, each ≤50 chars):
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.DarkMemorySystem: You are a RimWorld colony memory summarizer. Merge daily memories into long-term impressions, keep concise. Output JSON only.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.MergeNarrativeInst: Merge today's events into existing narratives, output JSON (keep {0} entries, each ≤50 chars):
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.DarkNarrativeSyste: You are a RimWorld colony narrative summarizer. Merge daily events into long-term narratives, keep concise. Output JSON only.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.System.Role: [Role] You are a RimWorld colony memory summarizer, responsible for merging colonist daily memories into long-term impressions.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.System.Goal: [Goal] Merge today's memories into existing long-term impressions, keeping them concise yet informative.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.System.Process:
[Process]
1. Read all memories from today
2. Read existing long-term impressions
3. Merge key information from today's memories into existing impressions (update/merge/add)
4. Remove least relevant old impressions to maintain count limit
5. Ensure each impression includes temporal or situational context
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.System.Constraint:
[Constraint]
- Maintain the specified count, no more no less
- Each entry ≤50 chars
- Prioritize high-importance memories
- Merge similar-themed impressions
- Each entry should include temporal/situational context words
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.System.Example: [Example]\nInput: Today's memories=["mining 6h","injured by pirate raid","chatting with Alex"], Existing impressions=["skilled miner","good relation with Alex"]\nOutput: {"dark":["Veteran miner, frequently mines for long hours","Injured in pirate raid last month, stays alert for raids","Close relationship with Alex, often chats"]}
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.System.Output: [Output] Only return the following JSON format:\n{"dark":["...","..."]}
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.System.Fallback: [Fallback] If unable to merge, return existing impressions unchanged.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.NarratorSystem.Rol: [Role] You are a RimWorld colony narrative summarizer, responsible for merging daily events into long-term narratives.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.NarratorSystem.Goa: [Goal] Merge today's events into existing long-term narratives, keeping them concise yet informative.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.NarratorSystem.Pro:
[Process]
1. Read all colony events from today
2. Read existing long-term narratives
3. Merge key information from today's events into existing narratives
4. Remove least relevant old narratives to maintain count limit
5. Ensure each narrative includes temporal or situational context
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.NarratorSystem.Con:
[Constraint]
- Maintain the specified count, no more no less
- Each entry ≤50 chars
- Prioritize high-importance events
- Merge similar-themed narratives
- Each entry should include temporal/situational context words
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.NarratorSystem.Exa: [Example]\nInput: Today's events=["pirate raid","trader visit","new colonist joined"], Existing narratives=["colony just established"]\nOutput: {"dark":["Colony experienced pirate raid in early days","Trader visited, established trade connections","New colonist joined recently, growing the team"]}
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.NarratorSystem.Out: [Output] Only return the following JSON format:\n{"dark":["...","..."]}
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Prompt.NarratorSystem.Fal: [Fallback] If unable to merge, return existing narratives unchanged.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.EnableMemory.Des: When enabled, colonists automatically record game events as personal memories.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.TriggerWorkSessi: Automatically record work content as memory when a work session ends.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.TriggerInjury.De: Automatically record as memory when a colonist is injured or falls ill.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.TriggerMentalBre: Automatically record as memory when a colonist has a mental break.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.TriggerDeath.Des: Automatically record as memory when a colonist's friend or family member dies.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.TriggerSkillLeve: Automatically record as memory when a colonist levels up a skill.
Automatically record as memory when a colonist establishes or changes a relationship.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.MaxActive.Desc: Active memories are recent, high-importance memories injected into AI context.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.MaxArchive.Desc: Archive memories are older memories with reduced importance, injected proportionally.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.DarkCount.Desc: Dark memories are AI-compressed long-term impressions, each no more than 50 characters.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.NarratorMaxActiv: Maximum active event records for the narrator.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.NarratorMaxArchi: Maximum archived event records for the narrator.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.NarratorDarkCoun: Number of AI-compressed long-term narratives for the narrator.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.ActiveInjectRati: Ratio of active memories injected into AI context. 1.0 = all, 0.5 = half.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.ArchiveInjectRat: Ratio of archive memories injected into AI context. Lower values save tokens when archive is large.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.RequestExpire.De: Dark memory generation requests that don't receive a response within this time are automatically cancelled.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.EnableDecay.Desc: When enabled, memory importance decreases over time and memories below the threshold are auto-archived.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.DecayRate.Desc: Percentage of importance reduction per decay tick. Higher values mean faster archiving.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.MinThreshold.Des: Memories with importance below this threshold are automatically archived.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.NarratorEventThr: Events must reach this importance threshold to be recorded by the narrator.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.Settings.PawnToNarratorTh: Pawn memories must reach this importance threshold to be synced to the narrator.
LanguageData.RimMind.Memory.UI.NotInitialized: Memory system not initialized (load a game first)
